5.anchor: For of this you can be sure: No immoral, impure or greedy person—such a person is an idolater—has any inheritance in the kingdom of Christ and of God.
5.note: Or kingdom of the Messiah and God

31.anchor: “For this reason a man will leave his father and mother and be united to his wife, and the two will become one flesh.”

8.anchor: and gave gifts to his people.”

9.anchor: (What does “he ascended” mean except that he also descended to the lower, earthly regions
9.note: Or the depths of the earth

1.anchor: To God’s holy people in Ephesus,
1.note: Some early manuscripts do not have in Ephesus

5.anchor: predestined us for adoption to sonship
5.note: The Greek word for adoption to sonship

8.note: Or us with all wisdom and understanding. And he

11.anchor: In him we were also chosen,

17.anchor: I keep asking that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the glorious Father, may give you the Spirit

3.anchor: All of us also lived among them at one time, gratifying the cravings of our flesh
3.note: In contexts like this, the Greek word for flesh

3.anchor: “so that it may go well with you and that you may enjoy long life on the earth.”

23.anchor: Peace to the brothers and sisters,
23.note: The Greek word for brothers and sisters

24.anchor: Grace to all who love our Lord Jesus Christ with an undying love.
24.note: Or Grace and immortality to all who love our Lord Jesus Christ.
